zh.lifeSummary: John Deincourt是Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt和Isabel De Mohun的兒子，於1272年出生在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼。他與Agnes de Percy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年1月6日之前。

zh-hans.Branston, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾布藍斯頓

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Deincourt是Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt和Isabel De Mohun的儿子，于1272年出生在英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼。他与Agnes de Percy结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1327年1月6日之前。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: John Deincourt was born in 1272, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England as the son of Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt and Isabel De Mohun. He married Agnes de Percy. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 6 January 1327.

fr.lifeSummary: John Deincourt est né en 1272, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, fils de Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt et Isabel De Mohun. Il a épousé Agnes de Percy. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 6 janvier 1327.

de.lifeSummary: John Deincourt wurde 1272 in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, als Sohn von Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt und Isabel De Mohun geboren. Er hat Agnes de Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 6. Januar 1327.

it.lifeSummary: John Deincourt è nato il nel 1272 nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, England come figlio di Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt e Isabel De Mohun. Lui sposato Agnes de Percy. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 6 gennaio 1327.

ja.Dunster, Somerset, England: イギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスター

ja.lifeSummary: John Deincourtは1272年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーでSir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of EyncourtとIsabel De Mohunの息子として生まれた。Agnes de Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1327年1月6日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Deincourt(은)는 1272년 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt(와)과 Isabel De Mohun의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Agnes de Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 1월 6일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Deincourt nasceu em 1272, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra filho de Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt e Isabel De Mohun. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Percy. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 6 de janeiro de 1327.

ru.lifeSummary: John Deincourt родился в 1272 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt и Isabel De Mohun. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Percy. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 6 январь 1327 г.

es.lifeSummary: John Deincourt nació en 1272, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt y Isabel De Mohun. Se casó con Agnes de Percy. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 6 de enero de 1327.
